name: pricing-sections-01
title: Pricing Sections
author: Toby Belhome
description: Showcase your product or service plans with elegantly designed Tailwind CSS pricing sections. These layouts highlight features, pricing tiers, and value propositions with clarity, helping users make informed decisions. Ideal for SaaS platforms, subscription services, or product pages aiming for a modern, transparent, and conversion-friendly presentation.

files.content:
import { CircleCheck } from "lucide-react"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Card, CardContent, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"; export default function PricingSection() { const plans = [ { id: "starter", name: "Starter", description: "Perfect for startups and small teams", price: "$29", features: [ "Up to 10 team members", "Access to all core features", "Email support", "5GB cloud storage" ], button: { text: "Get Started", url: "https://app.yoursaas.com/signup" } }, { id: "growth", name: "Growth", description: "For growing businesses needing more power", price: "$79", features: [ "Unlimited team members", "Advanced analytics", "Priority email & chat support", "Unlimited cloud storage" ], button: { text: "Get Started", url: "https://app.yoursaas.com/signup" } } ]; return (

Flexible Plans for Every Stage

Whether you're just starting out or scaling fast, we’ve got a plan that fits your needs.

{plans.map((plan) => (

{plan.name}

{plan.description}

{plan.price}
    {plan.features.map((feature, index) => (
  • {feature}
    • ))}
))}
); }
